reviews.title: Great Value!
reviews.text: Fits my Oral B electric toothbrush. Bristle style is a little different than what I'm used to. But it cleans my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement toothbrush heads. Cant beat the price vs the comparable name brand.

reviews.title: Works fine. Medium soft.
reviews.text:
These are perfectly good replacement toothbrush heads.
They're what I would call a medium-soft bristle, which is about as soft as I like.

Minor points:
Many replacements now come with plastic hoods that snap on to protect the brush from airborne contaminates. These don't.

OEM brushes let you swap the little colored rings on the base, so you can always keep your favorite color. These don't. They have different colors, but they can't be changed.

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text:
Replacement brush heads can be so expensive. That's why I love finding value replacements online.
Nice price for the 4 brush heads. These are good for one person for a year at least.
Brushes are soft so no damaging my gums or teeth.
Works perfect with my oral b.

reviews.title: Fits my electric toothbrush
reviews.text: Just like the original except the price.With the originals price keep going up, this is a very good alternative. shipping was quick.

reviews.title: Fits perfect, soft feeling, strong
reviews.text:
I've been using OralB floss action toothbrush heads for a long time.

While these aren't floss action they clean my teeth nicely.

They fit the OralB toothbrush perfectly, actually felt a little click when I connected it.

The bristles are softer than the brush heads I've been using.

After almost a week of use they seem to be holding up well and feel very strong while using them.

At a little over $2 per head they are a pretty good deal.

reviews.title: High quality bamboo toothbrush, worth the money!
reviews.text:
I was looking for a more sustainable toothbrush to replace the plastic ones I've been using forever. I found out about bamboo toothbrushes and I had to try them.

What I really like about these is how big the heads on them are. The wood is nice and smooth and it's easy to hold. I also prefer firm toothbrushes and picked these specifically because they were marked as "super hard" - and they really do live up to the name, because they were actually a little too hard for me. (I suspect I was brushing too hard since I'm used to different types of brushes, so it's just something I have to get used to.) I'm not knocking down the rating on that, though, because they were true to their advertising. :)

Very good brushes. I plan to buy them again.

reviews.title: These are HARD
reviews.text:
UPDATE: these ended up making my tongue bleed quite a bit. Why you’d need this type of brush for your mouth… I have no idea. Can’t return cause I used it. Otherwise I would , so I think I’ll use them for a teeny bonfire.

I will preface this by saying I use an electric oral b cross action toothbrush . I got these to brush my tongue . And the toothbrush is HARD. Like it made my tongue bleed. Idk who is using this for their teeth lol be careful if u are. It worked amazing for the purpose I got it for but just be cautious.

reviews.title: If you have sensitive gums, buy this OEM Oral-B Toothbrush Head vs Chinese After-Market
reviews.text: My wife has sensitive gums.  These OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads are much softer but still do the job vs supposedly equivalent "sensitive" Chinese After-Market heads.  While the Chinese after-market toothbrush heads are much cheaper, they contributed to my wife's $2,000. gum surgery.  I swapped back to OEM Oral-B brush heads and all is now good for her.  Live and learn I guess or, better yet, you get what you pay for.  Buy these OEM Oral-B toothbrush heads with confidence.

The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

features: 【Provides Diamond Cleaning】Bitvae Smart S3 Rechargeable sonic toothbrush features an industry-leading ultrasonic motor that generates 40,000RPM. It provides superior cleaning even in hard-to-reach areas of your mouth. If you are looking for a professional cleaning toothbrush, this is the one!

【Unique Bristle Design to Prevent Tooth Decay】The unique bristle design of the sonic cleaning brush sets it apart from others. Users can get a more thorough dental cleaning experience than with a standard toothbrush. Effectively reduces tartar buildup and helps prevent tooth decay or cavities.

【Personalize Your Brushing】Here are 5 modes & 3 intensities on our sonic toothbrush (9 adjustable intensities on the app) for various gum care needs. This IPX7 waterproof toothbrush has a built-in 2mins timer that pulses every 30secs to remind you to switch to the next quadrant of the mouth.

【180-Day Battery Life】Bitvae S3 long-lasting battery toothbrush for adults features a 4-hour quick-charge battery that lasts up to 180 days, making it perfect for travel and far outperforming other toothbrushes on the market. Say goodbye to the bulky charging base with our USB Type-C cable.

【Pressure sensor protects teeth and gums】 Brushing too hard can damage tooth enamel, increase sensitivity and lead to gum recession. Our electronic toothbrush with pressure indicator will light up RED to remind you to reduce the pressure to protect your teeth and gums.

【"iSpruz" Smart Oral Care App】This Smart Bluetooth Toothbrush is paired with the app to track and store data on brushing time, coverage, uniformity and excess pressure. You can also change various settings through the app (such as brushing modes, intensities, and brushing time).

reviews.title: Impressive amount of features and app allows customization and guidance for optimal brushing
reviews.text:
I got this to replace an old electric toothbrush, and I'm blown away at how technology has transformed tooth brushing! There are so many customizable features with this toothbrush, and the app will tell you if you're applying too much pressure, missing areas, or not spending enough time brushing.

Here are some of the pleasant surprises:

> Comes with a really nice travel case
> includes a special super soft brush head for gum massage
> The app is AMAZING. It's quick and easy to download and has lots of information and options to adjust the toothbrush operation
> Instruction pamphlet is well written and covers everything you need to know

HIGHLY RECOMMENDED!

reviews.title: Good value for the money, wish it pulsated a little stronger. Terrible app.
reviews.text: For the money this might be the best budget friendly electric toothbrush on Amazon in my opinion. Stay away from the app. It is terribly designed and doesn't consistently sync. The pulses are stronger than others in the same price class, but it isn't quite strong enough to give my mouth a feeling in deep cleaning.

title: Cybersonic3 Electric Toothbrush, Rechargable Power Toothbrush with Complete Dental Care Kit including Tongue Scraper and Floss Heads
description: The Cybersonic3 Electric Toothbrush is a COMPLETE ORAL CARE SYSTEM that truly does it all, with just one product you get a premium sonic power electric toothbrush that gives you that just left the dentist feeling, with an attachable flosser head perfect for those hard to reach areas, and attachable tongue scraper to keep your breath amazingly fresh. It gives you that DENTIST CLEANING FEEL with our patented Harmonic Resonance technology moving at over 40,000 strokes per minute, making it the "World's Fastest Toothbrush" with each scientifically designed attachement vibrating at a specific frequency for the perfect cleaning every time. It gives you a LONG LASTING CHARGE that allows up to 1-2 weeks of usage with a fully charged brush, giving you the convenient option of leaving the charging base at home when you travel for the weekend, along with a CLEVERLY DESIGNED CHARGING BASE measures 3 inches in diameter with a detachable accessory holder, so it won't take up much needed counter space. We back our quality with our promise which is 100% SATISFACTION, with a 30 day money back guarantee no questions asked, along with 1 full year manufacturer's warranty.

reviews.title: Best toothbrush
reviews.text: This is my second cybersonic toothbrush.  When my first cybersonic failed after many years of good service I ordered a less expensive name brand electric toothbrush and after 6 weeks threw it away and ordered my new cybersonic. Lesson learned.

reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text:
I've been using Cybersonic for decades. My teeth don't feel clean without it.
My second handle/rechargable battery needed replacing, so I decided to try the Cybersonic 3. I was surprised how much lighter it feels. And I think the oscillation is faster, but I didn't read up on it to check. Same great result - really clean teeth. The timing indicator isn't something I wanted/needed, but doesn't bother me. I has basically ignore it. Hope this handle lasts as long as my previous ones.
I really like the charging base. I discarded the side attachments to hold extra brushes and accessories, which left me with a sleek, minimalistic charging base.
So far I'm really happy with my purchase & highly recommend this product/brand/company.

reviews.title: Simply the best.
reviews.text: A system approach to oral hygiene that works for me, and the best oral health care product of its kind available. PERIOD!

reviews.title: Three Stars
reviews.text: OKAY

reviews.title: Five Stars
reviews.text: Gives great results for families.

❥U+2 BRUSHES: U-Type brush head made up of food grade silicone, is soft to prevent gum being damaged. DuBang brush head can effectively clean teeth. Round brush head with soft bristles can remove hard-to-reach plaque. 3 type of brush heads to meet different needs.

❥IPX7 WATERPROOF: IPX7 waterproof craft allow direct wash with water after brushing, easy and convenient, Easily and safely enjoy the brushing even in the shower.
❥BATTERY OPERATED: Uses 1 AAA battery (not included)

reviews.title: Doesn’t even work
reviews.text: It doesn’t come with a battery, which is fine - except it’s very difficult to get a battery in. The opening isn’t big enough and you have to shove it in there. It feels like you’re going to break something. Then i turned it on and it didn’t even work ….. so this is useless. So i will be returning it.

reviews.title: It helps
reviews.text: Little one age 3 now likes to brush her teeth now.

reviews.title: Cute
reviews.text: It is cute but received it in a damaged box with parts outside of the box loose in the package. Easy to use.

reviews.title: Cheap, broken in 1 week
reviews.text: Bristles are just glued on and came off in a week. Item is cheaply made in general. Would not recommend, wish I could get my money back.

reviews.title: It vibrates and nothing more
reviews.text: It says electric toothbrush and requires batteries but all it does is vibrate. I suppose a toddler doesn’t need an electric toothbrush. Just letting anyone reading this know all it does is vibrate.

title: CORATED Toddler Toothbrush U-Shaped Kids Toothbrush Baby Soft Silicone Toothbrush Manual Training Toothbrush Infant 360° Oral Teeth Cleaning Design for Kids 2-7 Years Old (Doughnut Brown)
features: 【SAFETY MATERIAL】Different from ordinary toothbrushes, U-shaped toothbrushes use safe food-grade silicone material, which is soft and comfortable, has no peculiar smell, and without BPA. Mothers are more at ease to protect the baby's oral health.

【360° EFFECTIVE CLEANING】The unique U-shaped toothbrush head design is more suitable for Toddler's tooth structure. It fits each tooth perfectly and provides adequate cleaning and protection for your child's teeth.

【FUN&CUTE TOOTHBRUSH】The cute rainbow and doughnut patterns, and the creative U-shaped toothbrush make it easy and fun for children to brush their teeth. This helps your child be willing to brush their teeth longer and even develop healthy brushing habits, say goodbye to tooth decay.

【EXTRA SOFT TOOTHBRUSH】The silicone bristles is soft on children's teeth and gums, clean teeth gently and massage baby’s delicate gums. The Soft brush head help get into hard to reach areas and effectively and remove stains.

【EASY TO USE】Squeeze toothpaste on the both side of the baby's toothbrush and put the kids toothbrush into baby's mouth, Swing it left to right, in 60 seconds finished the brushing. This package comes with 1 silicone toothbrush and 1 replacement silicone brush head, it is recommended to replace the brush head every 1 month. Toothbrush size: 85mm/3.35", Brush head size: 1.96"*0.98". Specially designed for the teeth of toddlers aged 2-7.

reviews.title: Nifty toothbrush, brush all the teeth at once
reviews.text:
Just add toothpaste, stick in mouth and brush side to side. Gets all the teeth clean at the same time. Very nifty. The brush head is a little flexible, so it can adjust to her jaw shape. I think the only thing that concerns me is that this is not really teaching the kid how to brush with a regular toothbrush. For now, it's really useful since she gets impatient with brushing teeth.
It came with a spare brush head which just pops on to the small metal rod. It's also very cute.

reviews.title: Simple and easy to use
reviews.text: This little toothbrush is pretty cheap in comparison to others similar to it, but it also doesn’t have any special functions. It just works as is, you put tooth paste between the bristles and then it’s used manually. No vibrations or flashing colors, but it does have a super cute design and hey at least it doesn’t need to be charged because those cords always seem to get lost too lol. Great price point for a bit more of a detailed, deep clean for kiddos’ teeth. Recommend!

reviews.text: Leave teeth very clean and bright

reviews.text: good toothbrush for teeth

reviews.title: getting hard to find these
reviews.text: it's getting hard to find these brushes WITHOUT the stupid rubber parts on the sides, so when i find them, i buy a few packs.  these are better than the last ones i had - there's a rough texture on the back of the brush head (raised less than 1mm) that feels nice against the inside of my cheek while brushing - probably also good to clean your tongue.

reviews.title: Wonderful toothbrushes.
reviews.text: Works great and does not flex, very sturdy.

reviews.title: I like the feel of this toothbrush- BUT....
reviews.text:
Within maybe a week to 10 days, it already looks worn out and may not be cleaning as well. I may try a 2nd brush but if it's not any better, these are going back to the big box store that starts with a C that I bought them at.

Not sure if the medium would be better or not. I may call Oral B and/or I may try another brand and/or return them.

reviews.title: It came off
reviews.text: My daughter pull off the rubber part that it attached to the metal part. I have no idea if it was supposed to do that. She can still use it but I to help her get it out of her mouth at times. I need to see if I can have it exchanged for a new one. Its a lot easier to get her to brush her teeth she likes it and she is 4

reviews.title: Not worth it
reviews.text: My eldest has a difficult time with the sensation of anything against his gums.  This results in nasty plaque.  I was hopeful that this would be a solution but it's not.  Expensive let down.

reviews.title: Worked great for 3 months
reviews.text: Worked great for 3 months. Then stopped working even though it was fully charged.

reviews.title: Good 4 Already Clean Kid Teeth
reviews.text:
Very easy and fun for toddlers who are learning to brush their teeth. Definitely must swish back and forth, for any actual cleaning to take place.

Wouldn't recommend for children with chronic oral hygiene issues. The bristles on this brush are not meant for heavy cleaning.

reviews.title: Love these
reviews.text: My kids absolutely love these. The brush their teeth everyday without a fight. I love them they are small perfect for kid hands and super easy to use.

title: Collis Curve Toothbrushes - Child's Mixed Dentition-Blue Cap
description: Front label panel: Collis Child's Toothbrush Instructions: Use to brush teeth Ingredients: Clinical tests show the curved bristle to be more effective in massaging gums and removing plaque than the conventional straight bristle. Supplemental Facts: Child's mixed dention bluecap

reviews.title: Make a softer brush
reviews.text: It cleans well, the bristles are not soft. I use it for my son with sensory issues. If they could make a brush with soft bristles, I would buy in bulk!

reviews.title: Fraction of the work of normal toothbrushes!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are great. I have been using the Mentadent (similar type of brush for adults) brushes on my teeth for years and can't find them anymore. I came across these brushes for my autistic child from a therapist. It allows me to brush their teeth in half the time and more precisely than when I try a regular toothbrush. It also helps them learn to brush their teeth with less frustration while hitting more areas of the teeth. Its a great concept and I am really surprised the regular toothbrush manufacturers aren't making these and putting them in stores everywhere.  The downside is the price- I do wish they were cheaper.

title: Zekuavi Replacement Heads Compatible with Phillips Sonicare Electric Toothbrush, Toothbrush Heads Fits for Diamond Protective Expert Daily 4100 5100 6100 1100 7500 6500, Black 8Pcs
features: ★Compatible with Phillips Sonicare, ProtectiveClean, ExpertClean,DailyClean,2 Series 3 Series, 4100/2100/9900Plaque Control,Gum Health, EasyClean, Essence+, FlexCare, HealthyWhite and HydroClean Philips Brush Handle, (NOT Compatible with Essence,Sonicare One,HX5611/01 Essence)

★US DuPont Bristles: Our brushes are made with DuPont bristles, which is the most representative high-quality nylon bristles. DuPont bristles mainly have the following advantages: high tenacity, strong bending recovery, outstanding wear resistance, and perfect cleaning power.

★Durable brush: Thanks to DuPont bristles, our brush can be used for a long time without being easily deformed, the service life varies according to the brushing strength of each person: from 2 months for high brushing intensity to 3 months for moderate brushing intensity

★End-rounded bristles: For our brush bristles, we have adopted a variety of top-rounding techniques. The protruding bristles on the upper, middle and lower parts of the brush undergo the first rounding process; then the concave part is rounded for the second time to ensure that each bunch of bristles meet the standard. The multi-process is only to better protect your teeth and oral health

★High density bristles: The toothbrush head adopts the latest bristle planting technology, and the number of bristles has increased by 2 times. The bottom of each bunch of bristles is fixed with metal copper sheets, which can prevent bristle shed, increase the durability of the brush head, and greatly improve the cleaning ability.

★Vibration isolation and noise reduction: 306 stainless steel is used at the interface between the bottom of the toothbrush and the electric toothbrush, which can effectively reduce shake and noise, moreover, be more resistant to corrosion. Copper sheet is used inside the brush body to conduct sonic waves, improving the sonic wave transmission efficiency and the cleaning capacity by 5 times.

★Suitable for Home Use: If you purchase our product, you will receive 8 replacement toothbrush heads neatly placed in a blister case. Each brush head has its own color markings at the bottom and back, making it easy to distinguish without worrying about confusion.
★Bacterial Protection Bristles :The special bacterial protection bristles help to keep your brush head clean and inhibit bacterial growth on the brush.

★HYGIENIC CAP :Each replacement sonicare brush head comes with a hygienic secure cover to keep your bristle free of dust and debris. You don't have to worry about bacteria that might cause you dental problems.

★Reminder bristles: Our Green indicator bristles discolour to let you know when to replace them, don't need to worry or guess. Dentists recommend replacing the brush head at least once every 3 months.

reviews.title: Works great with my sonicare
reviews.text: Works great and a good price . Good purchase, very happy with them

reviews.title: A Great Replacement
reviews.text: I'm not sure which model toothbrush I have, only that it's pretty basic and several years old, but still going strong. These brush heads are a perfect fit and work just like the brand name. I did find these to be a bit larger than the one I replaced, and the bristles were a bit longer, so it just felt bigger in my mouth overall. That being said, the bristles on these are softer and I find them to be gentler on my sensitive gums, even with the bigger brush size. Each brush has a colored dot (4 different colors) to differentiate between them if necessary. Overall, I'm happy with these.

reviews.title: Good affordable ootion
reviews.text: These brush heads are a good replacement option at an amazing price.

reviews.title: Works well for my Philips Sonicare 4100
reviews.text: This 8-pack of replacement brush heads for several Philips sonicare rechargeable toothbrush models fits my Sonicare 4100 perfectly. Popped on smoothly with no weird gaps. These are a larger size compared to the small Phillips diamond head style that I have been using and I've included a photo of a comparison showing this new replacement and the Philips sonicare branded brush side by side. I was worried they wouldn't be soft, but they are and I'm pleased with the bristles. After using for a week, I am glad I tried them and wouldn't hesitate to continue to use these and save some money.

reviews.title: Soft bristles
reviews.text:
I was running low on my Sonicare heads so I decided to give these a try, excited because they are a fraction of the cost of the name brand kind, especially for a package of 8.

They fit the handle just fine, but they aren’t chip-enabled to work with the automatic brush change reminder light on several Sonicare handles. So like regular toothbrushes you have to keep track of when you need to change it again.

I put my old ready-to-be-changed head back on immediately, as these bristles aren’t even close to “medium” hardness. They are SOFT. My old head has much stiffer-bristles than this new one, which I prefer.

I gave it a 2 rating because they do work for my Sonicare brush handle just fine, but they don’t work for me personally. If you need soft for sensitive gums, then these are for you.

You can’t go wrong with the Gum Care setting and these replacement heads if you need soft bristles. For the price, a pack of 8 is a steal!

They just aren’t for me, they are way too soft, I’m bummed.

title: LAFATON 2 in 1 toothcleaner,Electric Toothbrush with Water Flosser Combo in One,Rechargeable Sonic Flossing Toothbrush with 3 Teeth Cleansing Ways,Waterproof Dental Oral Irrigator for Oral Care.
features: 【2-IN-1 Toothcleaner】Combines sonic electric toothbrush with Water Flosser,the brush cleans the surface of the teeth, the water floss deeply cleans between the teeth and gums, they can work at the same time to take care of the teeth more efficiently.
【Choose Your Favorite Cleaning Method】Unique design and 3 different tips, you can choose 3 cleaning methods with just one device：tooth brush,water flosser, both at the same time.
【On The Go Brush】Detachable handle (with built-in rechargeable battery), spare water inlet hose, carry your favorite spout for brushing your teeth on the go.
【4 Foss Modes】Retains the traditional water flosser modes:Normal(daily clean),Soft(suitable for beginners),Pluse(massage gums),DIY(Set the right water pressure yourself).
【Long Battery Life & Waterproof】 Built-in large rechargeable battery,lasting 25 days of normal daily use with only 4 hours required to fully charge.IPX7 waterproof rating for safe use in the shower.
【Key Features】500ml large water tank; 2 minutes AUTO-OFF for safe use; unique storage drawer to store spare tip and charging cables.

reviews.title: Good water flosser
reviews.text:
I got this because my last water flosser has such a tiny water reservoir I don’t bother using it. I bought this one because of the larger water reservoir.

The first time I went to use it I was ready to give it 1 star. It was terrible. No water came out and my troubleshooting efforts left me nothing but frustrated. I tossed it back in the box to try again when I was less annoyed.

Then I tried again and love it. I don’t know what worked differently, but it’s worked well since the first time. Maybe it needed to get cursed at a few times to warm up. The flosser has different settings so you can pick what’s right for you. I liked the pulse setting because it seemed to leave me with less of that annoying water flosser spray that seems inevitable no matter how careful I am.

I didn’t love the toothbrush, and the water+toothbrush setting just seemed to be a mess with no actual flossing effect. I don’t intend to use this for brushing, but it will definitely replace my old water flosser.

reviews.title: A good deal having an electric toothbrush and flosser in one!
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:5025a1cf3fd1dd9c157cb4eefde50d23]] If you can't have regular visits to the dentist, you may try this product! It is a toothbrush and flosser in one which is a good deal! It was messy on my first try as shown on the attached pic! I used the external water for the flosser and wasn't able to properly attached the flosser. I finally was able to  manage it on my subsequent attempts.  Although you can choose the different modes of output, the pressure of the water is a bit strong. I'm not sure if you can adjust the pressure. If you have sensitive gums or teeth, expect a little bleeding. Overall, this  is a great home product which I recommend!

reviews.title: WOW!
reviews.text: Nice combination. I've used the oral b, water pik and now this one. Its messy and the brush flosser isn't the hottest. By itself ok. If you disconnect the water line, plan on water everywhere. I prefer, the water pik and this brush. No fuss, no mess. Rechargeable is a plus. Looks to last a long time. Sonic vibrations are the bomb. Depending on your teeth, sonic is great. Not going back to oral b, sonic is much better. As a stand alone brush its great and worth the money for that alone.

reviews.title: Brush brush brush your teeth.
reviews.text: I've never owned a electric toothbrush so I wasn't sure what to expect. But after I received the unit I'm not sure how I survived without it. An electric toothbrush makes the tedious job of brushing your teeth a lot easier. The unit has numinous settings to (my favorite is pulse) allow you to select the best for your style of brushing. The head is relatively small so it can get all the way to your back teeth with ease. The real bonus is the water flosser feature. The first time tried it I ended up spraying the mirror and getting water everywhere since. Once i got the hang of it it felt good to use it in conjunction with he brush.  At first I couldn't figure out with the additional hose set was for. So I went back to the instructions and realized that it was for those times when I was out of my house so I could water floss.

reviews.title: Good combination but not executed well
reviews.text:
I have a sonic toothbrush that I love. I also have a water flosser that I love. I thought the idea of combining the two was genius. It made perfect sense to have a device that flushes out the spaces between your teeth while you brush. Unfortunately, while this model combines the two functions, it doesn't do either function as well as the individual devices do on their own. The vibrating toothbrush function is ok but not great. The water flosser doesn't feel like it has the same power or precision (even on the highest setting) as my stand alone water flosser. Also, the hose that connects the water flosser to the brush kinks very easily (especially if you use anything but warm water) so it's difficult to maneuver around your mouth without it stopping because the hose bent too much.
If I had never owned a vibrating toothbrush or a water flosser before I might think this was an awesome device but I was really hoping for more.

title: AhlsenL 3 Pack Kids U Shaped Toothbrush, 360° Full Mouth Training Toddler Toothbrush Silicone Manual Toothbrush for Kids Toddler Children(Blue)

reviews.title: Cute but a bit smaller than expected
reviews.text: This 3 pack baby toothbrushes are good and soft. They’re easy to hold and grab for kids. However,  they appear a bit smaller in person than the picture. Which is why they can’t get to all the areas of the mouth properly. They make good teething tool and starter toothbrushes for kids close to 12 months or so.

reviews.title: They are handy
reviews.text: These are really cute and logical. My toddler won't use them( we been having trouble getting him to let me brush his teeth) I'm going to try them on my other baby when his mouth is bigger

reviews.title: Cute
reviews.text: Cute and great for toddlers
